caption: A screen recording captures a web browser open to a mind-mapping tool and a video call. The central workspace displays a complex network of nodes and connections against a dark background, featuring various circular icons and labels such as " insights -> Introduction & Rules" and " Road Community Food Spot". A man wearing a black hat is visible in a small video window in the upper right corner. Throughout the sequence, a white 3D animated figure appears and moves across the map, acting as a cursor or guide. As the video progresses, the colors of the mind map shift from vibrant hues to a muted, grayscale palette. The browser tabs at the top include titles like "True Learning by Synthesis" and "Future of Society by Synthesis". On-screen text within the map includes "insights -> Introduction & Rules" and "Road Community Food Spot".
